title: SolidStart
excerpt: description: Deploy a SolidStart application to Cloudflare Pages. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. [Solid ↗](https://www.solidjs.com/) is an open-source web application framework focused on generating performant applications with a modern developer experience based on JSX. In this guide, you will create a new Solid application implemented via [SolidStart ↗](https://start.solidjs.com/getting-started/what-is-solidstart) (Solid's meta-framework) and deploy it using Cloudflare Pages.
